title: @liverail/server
summary: Server runtime for contract-driven realtime applications.

sections.title: Core Runtime
sections.summary: Create a typed server runtime around the contract registry.

sections.title: Connection Context
sections.summary: Inject request-specific context for handlers, policies and lifecycle hooks.

sections.title: Policies and Handlers
sections.summary: Keep command, connection, join and receive decisions explicit and typed.

sections.title: Transport Adapters
sections.summary: Expose transport-specific integrations through dedicated public subpath exports.

bestPractices: Keep the root runtime transport-agnostic and wire adapters through explicit entrypoints.
Prefer context injection and policies over ad-hoc checks inside handlers.
Treat lifecycle hooks as operational extension points, not as a plugin system.
